sessions.title: CHUB Code Reviewer v0.3.0 — Self-Learning Mechanism
sessions.summary: Designed, implemented, and shipped self-learning for CHUB Code Reviewer plugin. LLM Council validated design (3 sessions). Learning agent runs in parallel, persists to shared kb-store branch via GitHub API. Tested on real PRs (AudienceService#14, idx-cdp#22).
outcomes: Self-learning operational — 10 rules exposed, state persisting to kb-store branch
Confidence formula with proper denominator validated by council
next: Run more reviews to pass 5-observation provisional threshold
Test on Java PR for JAVA-rule exposures
Test promote-rule flow when a candidate emerges

sessions.title: EC Connector — Account Schema Ack Investigation + PR to Slack
sessions.summary: Investigated callID db5c3bfb failing to sync accounts to Engagement Cloud. CDFLDispatcher dropped full-groups because Corporate Account API was disabled. Found CdpReceiverService holds EC-side NAck identifiers. Contacted EC developers, they enabled API, confirmed data flowing. Sent connectors PR #4 to Slack.
outcomes: Root cause: Corporate Account API disabled on EC connector app HMyOvinDT0aERcfmhTpKyg
EC devs (Mauro Greco, Nicolae Ciumac) enabled the API
Group Schema + Relationship Schema both acked — CdpPublisher now has hits
Discovered CdpReceiverService as source of EC-side NAck identifiers
Knowledge base updated with CdpReceiverService learnings
PR #4 posted to Slack with fyi @Yedidyah
Fixed newline bug in slack-pr-notification (jq --arg vs jq -Rs)
blockers: cdp-kibana MCP server still failing (-32000) — used direct curl workaround
next: Verify account data visible in EC UI
